title: mimosa dolens var. rigescens
intro: Mimosa dolens var. rigescens, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a variety of the Mimosa dolens plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family of flowering plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mimosa dolens var. rigescens include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation and sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. Mimosa dolens var. rigescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
